Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Tony Hoare has died 1951 upvotes, 255 comments
  2. Where Some See Strings, She Sees a Space-Time Made of Fractals 48 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. Show HN: I built an ISP infrastructure emulator from scratch with a custom vBNG 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Cloudflare crawl endpoint 435 upvotes, 166 comments
  5. AI Agent Hacks McKinsey 222 upvotes, 88 comments
  6. Building a TB-303 from Scratch 181 upvotes, 71 comments
  7. Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web 117 upvotes, 43 comments
  8. Temporal: A nine-year journey to fix time in JavaScript 181 upvotes, 76 comments
  9. PeppyOS: A simpler alternative to ROS 2 (now with containers support) 56 upvotes, 19 comments
  10. Entities enabling scientific fraud at scale are large, resilient, growing (2025) 176 upvotes, 83 comments
  11. Zig – Type Resolution Redesign and Language Changes 364 upvotes, 201 comments
  12. BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs 212 upvotes, 112 comments
  13. Visualizing Ukkonen's Suffix Tree Algorithm 12 upvotes, 2 comments
  14. Faster asin() was hiding in plain sight 119 upvotes, 59 comments
  15. Writing my own text editor, and daily-driving it 188 upvotes, 101 comments
  16. Fungal Electronics 10 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. Show HN: Open-source browser for AI agents 32 upvotes, 14 comments
  18. Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world 574 upvotes, 467 comments
  19. Lego's 0.002mm specification and its implications for manufacturing (2025) 275 upvotes, 217 comments
  20. Show HN: Klaus – OpenClaw on a VM, batteries included 36 upvotes, 20 comments
  21. Wiz joins Google 84 upvotes, 60 comments
  22. Elevated errors on login with Claude Code 48 upvotes, 34 comments
  23. Launch HN: Prism (YC X25) – Workspace and API to generate and edit videos 15 upvotes, 7 comments
  24. Show HN: Vanilla JavaScript refinery simulator built to explain job to my kids 22 upvotes, 13 comments
  25. Show HN: Site Spy – Track webpage changes with diffs, element picking, and RSS 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  26. Launch HN: Sentrial (YC W26) – Catch AI Agent Failures Before Your Users Do 9 upvotes, 5 comments
  27. Searching for the Agentic IDE 6 upvotes, 4 comments
  28. Swiss e-voting pilot can't count 2,048 ballots after decryption failure 38 upvotes, 88 comments
  29. Why the global elite gave up on spelling and grammar 42 upvotes, 109 comments
  30. The MacBook Neo 45 upvotes, 174 comments

Last generated 2:00am, 12 March 2026. Source here.
